name: ad-4-hatman
description: Hatman / sleep paralysis — continuous selfie POV (1 image, 2 Kling motion variations) + 1 real iPhone screen recording. Implied threat, never showing Hatman. Hooks based on r/Dreams verbatim.

data.prompt:
Vertical 9:16 hyperrealistic iPhone front-camera selfie. A young woman in her early 20s is lying flat on her back in bed at night, holding her iPhone above her face at arm's length, looking up into the camera. Her face is the main subject, framed center, slightly off-axis as she holds the phone unsteadily.

LIGHTING: The only light source is the phone screen itself glowing onto her face from below — soft cool-blue/white screen-light illuminating her cheeks, forehead, and the tip of her nose, leaving the rest of the bedroom plunged into deep shadow. The lower half of her face is the brightest, the upper edges fall off into dark shadow. Faint warm hallway light barely visible far in the background through an open doorway behind her head.

FACE — extreme photorealism: visible skin pores across her cheeks, nose, and chin; a scattering of natural freckles across her nose-bridge and upper cheeks; subtle imperfections — a tiny pimple near her jaw, faint redness around the nostrils, slightly chapped lips with natural pink tone, no lipstick; very fine peach-fuzz hair on her cheeks catching the phone light; oily T-zone shine; tiny dark circles under her eyes from being woken up. Her brow is faintly furrowed, eyes wide, pupils slightly dilated from the dark, looking directly into the camera lens with a scared, focused stare. Dry-lipped, half-parted mouth as if she's about to whisper.

HAIR: tousled brown bed-hair, slightly greasy from sleep, falling messily across the pillow, a few strands stuck to her forehead.

WARDROBE: thin white cotton t-shirt visible at the collarbone, no jewelry, no makeup.

CAMERA: vertical 9:16, iPhone 15 Pro front-camera aesthetic, slightly noisy in low light, mild lens distortion at the edges, shallow depth of field with subtle blur on the pillow corners, micro-motion blur from her unsteady hand holding the phone. Subtle iPhone night-mode grain across the whole frame.

NO logos, no text, no captions, no watermarks. Authentic 3 AM personal recording vibe — looks like a real phone selfie, not a studio shot.
data.label: POV selfie — phone-lit face (used for BOTH Kling clips)

data.prompt:
POV iPhone selfie video — same young woman lying in bed, phone held above her face, screen-glow lighting her from below. Calm, steady, intimate.

MOTION: very minimal — natural micro-shake from unsteady hand holding the phone, occasional slow blink, lips parting and closing softly as she whispers, chest rises and falls slowly with breath. Eyes locked on camera lens.

VOICE (close-mic intimate scared whisper, lips barely moving): "ok hear me out... so I had sleep paralysis last night and there was a man in a hat standing in the doorway."

Sound: very close-mic intimate whisper, faint bedroom room tone, no music, no other ambient noise. Vertical 9:16, iPhone night-mode grain, low-light noise across the frame. Authentic phone selfie aesthetic.
data.label: Clip 1 (0:00-0:05) — Hook, calm whisper

data.prompt:
POV iPhone selfie video — same young woman in same position, lying in bed, phone above face, screen-glow lighting her. Continuation of the previous clip, no scene change.

MOTION ARC across 5 seconds:
0-2s: she keeps whispering calmly, lips moving softly, micro-shake of phone, slow blinks.
2.5s: SUDDEN reaction — her eyes snap sharply to the right, away from the camera lens, looking past the phone toward something behind it. Her mouth freezes mid-word, slightly parted. Her breath catches audibly.
3s: small involuntary jolt — phone tilts/shakes for half a second as her hand reacts. Camera frame wobbles briefly.
3.5-5s: phone settles back, but her eyes stay locked off-camera (looking past it), face frozen in fear, mouth still parted, no breath, no blinking. She is paralysed staring at something we never see.

VOICE (close-mic intimate scared whisper, then breaks off):
First 2s: "I just googled it. apparently this guy shows up to people all over the world. like the sa—"
2.5s: cuts off abruptly mid-word, sharp tiny breath in.
2.5-5s: silence except very faint shaky breathing, no words, just pure tension.

Sound: intimate whisper that abruptly cuts to held breath and silence, faint bedroom room tone throughout, no music. Vertical 9:16, iPhone night-mode grain.
data.label: Clip 2 (0:05-0:10) — Reaction, mid-sentence break
📼 Upload iPhone screen recording (Dream app, 5s, voiceover synced)

meta.format: Continuous selfie POV: 1 image, 2 Kling × 5s (calm whisper + reaction break) + 1 real iPhone screen recording = 15s total
